item.description: Reverse Shells Credits: These reverse shells examples are reffered to EzpzShell by @h0j3n php reverse shell You can get a full reverse shell script here by PentestMonkey

item.title: 📝 AD CheatSheet
item.description: This is my personal safe for arsenals. Feel free to refer and use at anytime. You can also refer to this arsenals for any extra commands (Ctrl+f will definitely help)
